win_condition: When both time tokens reach the end of the time track, highest final score wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, player who reached the final time-board space first wins.

categories.label: Buttons Remaining
categories.description: Each button remaining is worth 1 point in final scoring.

categories.label: Special Tile Bonus
categories.description: Add 7 points if player owns the 7x7 special tile.

categories.label: Empty Spaces Penalty
categories.description: Subtract 2 points per empty square on quilt board.
